summary: The diff implements a comprehensive conversion from 2D canvas to 3D React Three Fiber for the fighting game. REQ-12, REQ-13, and REQ-14 are all substantially addressed. The 3D scene, character meshes, arena floor, lighting, camera rig, ported game logic, particle system, and UI overlays are all present. One minor gap exists around explicit shadow rendering configuration, but overall coverage is strong.

missing_requirements.requirement: At least one dynamic light source illuminates the scene with noticeable shadow or shading on the arena floor/characters.
missing_requirements.reason: While directional light has castShadow=true set, there is no evidence that the Canvas or renderer has shadowMap enabled (e.g., gl={{ shadows: true }} on the Canvas, or receiveShadow on character meshes), so actual shadow rendering may not be functional.

hallucinated_features.description: Animated background energy pillars (EnergyPillar component) with pulsing opacity and scale animations
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention animated background pillars or energy column decorations. This is a purely cosmetic addition not requested in any requirement.

hallucinated_features.description: Floor glow line (FloorGlow component) — a pulsing purple line overlaid on the arena floor
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not request a floor glow line or any specific floor decoration beyond a visible 3D stage/floor. This is an unrequested cosmetic addition.

hallucinated_features.description: Dynamic camera zoom based on character spread distance adjusting camera Z based on distance between UG and Sukuna
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request specifies a fixed third-person side perspective camera. Dynamically adjusting camera zoom/Z distance based on character separation goes beyond the fixed side-view perspective requirement.
